title: Coffee Mod
description: Coffee, oh coffee! This mod introduces a coffee mod including flowing coffee, coffee potions, and more!
body:
The coffee mod includes all coffee related items! We have potions, arrows, flowing coffee and more coming! Try at your own risk to get sugared up on coffee! This mod is for Forge and currently only for 1.20.1! Beta version currently out so play at your own risk!

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccda2350d461477e360856f5e7ff3f4e2ead9214.jpeg)

When it comes to hosting servers, I always trust BisectHosting. New customers can use https://www.bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV to save 25% on their first month of a gaming server, and their dedicated support team is available 24/7 to provide you with top-notch assistance.
